live.title: PSG vs Bayern - Semi-Final - Leg 1 - 29 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: PSG and Bayern Munich meet in a high‑stakes clash, with Paris’ attacking flair testing Bayern’s composure and big‑game pedigree. Stars like Ousmane Dembélé, Vitinha, and Désiré Doué are set to feature for PSG, while Harry Kane, Jamal Musiala, Joshua Kimmich, and Manuel Neuer lead Bayern’s push for a place in the final. Tune in to catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025‑26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: PSG and Bayern Munich meet in a high‑stakes clash, with Paris’ attacking flair testing Bayern’s composure and big‑game pedigree.
